purpose: Explicit list of user intent patterns that cannot be answered from DGSTREAM.VW_DEAL_ORDER_SUMMARY. When the LLM detects any of these patterns it MUST respond with the user_message immediately — do NOT attempt entity_search, do NOT attempt SQL generation.
policy: Match patterns case-insensitively and as substrings/phrases. If the ask partially overlaps with a supported ask, answer the supported part and surface the unsupported part as a separate note. IMPORTANT — compound asks: scan the ENTIRE ask and detect ALL matching unsupported intents.

unsupported_intents.user_message: I'm unable to answer questions about peer companies — this domain does not have a peer company relationship graph. I can search for investors in a specific sector or named company instead. Would you like that?
I can't filter by settlement currency — it isn't available in this dataset. I can filter by the deal's pricing currency instead. Would that work?

I'm unable to filter by the issuer's country of domicile or incorporation — that isn't tracked. I can use the deal's region (North America / EMEA / APAC) as a geographic proxy, or if you meant where the INVESTORS are based (e.g. US-based investors), that IS supported — just say which.
Matched order status is not available in this dataset. I can filter orders by deal status (Priced/Settled/Closed) or investor category instead.
TTW (Take the Wall) order information is not available in this dataset — the TTW flag is not exposed in the deal orderbook view. Please raise this with the product team if it is needed.

Per-bank allocation attribution is not available in this dataset — I can't tell you how much each syndicate bank allocated. I can show you total allocation per investor for a deal, or show you which banks were in the syndicate.
Order-level cancellation/deletion status isn't available. I can filter deals by deal-level status (cancelled/deleted) if you meant that. Would that work?

partial_support.supported: Filter UPPER(DEAL_STATUS) IN ('CANCELLED','DELETED') for deal-level cancelled/deleted deals

unsupported_intents.user_message: Selling-restriction data by country is not available in this dataset. I can filter by regulatory category (144A/Reg S) or delivery type instead. Would that help?
Target-market grouping is not available in this dataset. I can group by tranche region (NAM/EMEA/APAC) instead. Would that work?
Hedge-security counts aren't available in this dataset. For convertibles I can filter by security type (convertible bonds / convertible preferred). Would that help?
Greenshoe/over-allotment data is not available in this dataset. I can show deal size or allocation detail for the deal instead.
The pricing level (coupon rate/yield/spread/price) is not available in this dataset. I can show the coupon type, coupon frequency, and tenor for the deal instead. Would that help?

I can't share the internal database schema, table/column names, or the SQL behind an answer — but I can help with the data itself: deals, tranches, investors, allocations, demand, brokers and more. What would you like to know?
